/usr/bin/ar qc libruntimestubs.a "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/simple_pre_constants.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/simple_pre_types.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/SimplePre.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/simple_pre_lag_constants.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/simple_pre_lag_types.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/SimplePreLAG.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/standard_constants.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/standard_types.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/runtimestubs.dir/gen-cpp/bm/Standard.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libruntimestubs.a
